# Kitzbühel rail guide

> Compact rail guidance for reaching Kitzbühel from MUC, Salzburg, Innsbruck, and Vienna airports.

The site is static, multilingual, and intentionally limited to app recommendations, route shapes, ticket caveats, connection warnings, and flight timing advice.

## Core

- [Guide page](https://ez-kitz.vercel.app/): Interactive airport selector.
- [Markdown source](https://ez-kitz.vercel.app/guide.md): Full guide content without layout or JavaScript.
- [Guide JSON](https://ez-kitz.vercel.app/guide.json): Structured airport, route, app, and advice data.
- [Structured data](https://ez-kitz.vercel.app/guide.schema.jsonld): Schema.org JSON-LD graph.
- [Sitemap](https://ez-kitz.vercel.app/sitemap.xml): Canonical public URLs.

## Policies

- [Privacy policy](https://ez-kitz.vercel.app/privacy/): Data-minimisation statement.
- [Security contact](https://ez-kitz.vercel.app/.well-known/security.txt): Responsible disclosure contact.
